name: Sausage Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 package dry chicken soup mix (1.5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the sausage and drain it well.
2. Combine all ingredients in a lightly greased Crock-Pot.
3. Stir well to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
4. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 10 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours, or until the rice is tender.
5. Serves 4
